name: Probe Whoami
description: Invoke the gamma-conformance whoami probe endpoint.

name: Probe Echo
description: Invoke the gamma-conformance echo endpoint (schema + idempotency probe).

name: Probe Boom
description: Invoke the gamma-conformance boom endpoint (rollback + no-swallow probe).

name: Probe Report
description: Download the gamma-conformance CSV report (binary response probe).
